description.p: munim tracks your AI-coding token usage and dollar cost across many tools (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Roo, Aider, Continue, OpenClaw, and OpenAI Codex) by reading their local session logs. Everything stays on your machine — no cloud, no accounts, no telemetry.
Features a dark interactive dashboard, a system tray, auto-refresh, and a monthly budget with alerts.
